name: authenticate_otp
description: Verify a one-time passcode that was sent via SMS or email. Returns session credentials and user details on success. The OTP can only be used once.

parameters.name: method_id
parameters.description: The phone_id or email_id returned from the OTP send call.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The 6-digit one-time passcode entered by the user.

parameters.name: session_duration_minutes
parameters.description: Session lifetime in minutes (5-527040). Defaults to 60.

parameters.name: session_token
parameters.description: An existing session token to extend.
